headline: Tech Titan's Shadow Workforce SHOCKER!
subtext: Billionaire Vance Sterling built empire on hidden, exploited global labor. Outrage ignites over his hypocrisy!
celebrity_description: A sleek, sharp-dressed man in his late 40s with steely blue eyes and a confident, almost arrogant smirk. Impeccable dark suit, slicked-back dark hair.
story_summary: NovaLink Global CEO Vance Sterling, lauded for his 'ethical AI,' is embroiled in a colossal scandal. Investigations reveal his multi-billion dollar fortune was secretly built on a complex web of shell companies exploiting thousands of underpaid workers in developing nations, denying them basic rights while Sterling preached 'future of work' at exclusive summits.
image_prompt: A high-angle, dramatic close-up of Vance Sterling, a sleek, sharp-dressed man in his late 40s, with steely blue eyes and a confident, almost arrogant smirk, wearing an impeccable, dark tailored suit. He's standing in front of a blurred, opulent corporate office window at sunset, a subtle glow on his face, juxtaposed with ghostly, blurred silhouettes of overworked, impoverished factory workers in the background. The overall mood is cold, calculating, and slightly villainous. Cinematic lighting, photorealistic, ultra-detailed.
